name: MSSP - OS - MS - 28 - H - Domain Policy was Changed
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4739
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Change
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 28 - H - Domain Policy was Changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4739
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Change
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Domain policy was changed
